allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\(''fs''\); const html = fs.readFileSync\(''index.html'',''utf8''\); const ids = html.match\(/id=""\([^""]+\)""/g\).map\(m => m.slice\(4,-1\)\); console.log\(''IDs found:'', ids.length\); const dups = ids.filter\(\(id,i\) => ids.indexOf\(id\) !== i\); if \(dups.length\) console.log\(''DUPLICATE IDS:'', dups\); else console.log\(''No duplicate IDs''\); console.log\(''Scripts:'', html.match\(/src=""\([^""]+\)""/g\)\);")
Bash(git commit -m "Initial PHOTON commit: full-stack optical mesh network:*)
